description_long: This is a sporty, modern motorcycle with a striking red fuel tank and front fender, contrasted by a black seat and engine components. The frame is exposed and painted red, giving it a distinctive trellis design, while the exhaust system is prominently mounted on the right side. The motorcycle features dual disc brakes on the front wheel, a single-sided swingarm at the rear, and a compact, aggressive stance. The handlebars are wide and slightly raised, equipped with mirrors and standard controls. The brand 'Ducati' is visible on the fuel tank, indicating a high-performance Italian make. The rear of the motorcycle includes a license plate, dual exhaust outlets, and a streamlined tail section.
description: A red Ducati motorcycle with a trellis frame, black seat, dual exhausts, and sporty styling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red trellis frame, black seat, and right-mounted exhaust system.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide handlebars, dual front disc brakes, and aggressive headlight.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the left profile, engine, and single-sided swingarm.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the dual exhaust outlets, license plate, and narrow tail section.
